# Silicon Minds

> Silicon Minds is a strategic consulting firm specializing in AI-Driven Digital Reputation Management and Digital Trust. We help executives, institutions, and organizations measure and strengthen how they are represented across search engines and AI platforms.

Silicon Minds is not an SEO agency, an online reputation management vendor, or a marketing firm. It is a strategic consulting practice built around a proprietary methodology, the Digital Trust Framework™, which scores an entity's digital representation across seven weighted pillars: AI Visibility (20%), Search Reputation (20%), Executive Authority (15%), Entity Authority (15%), Media Presence (15%), Digital Trust Signals (10%), and Risk Assessment (5%). The output is a single, comparable Digital Trust Score™.

The flagship engagement is the AI Reputation Audit™, a comprehensive assessment of how ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Perplexity — alongside Google Search and the Knowledge Graph — represent a given entity. Audits produce a scored baseline and a four-quarter implementation roadmap.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://silicon-minds.com/index.html): Overview of Silicon Minds' positioning and the Digital Trust thesis.
- [About](https://silicon-minds.com/about.html): Why Digital Trust matters and why Silicon Minds was founded.
- [Solutions](https://silicon-minds.com/solutions.html): The nine Digital Trust solutions offered — AI Reputation Audit™, AI-Driven Digital Reputation Management™, Executive Digital Trust™, Authority Building™, Entity & Knowledge Graph Optimization™, Search Visibility Strategy™, Strategic Digital PR™, Digital Crisis Response™, and Executive Reputation Strategy™.
- [Digital Trust Framework™](https://silicon-minds.com/framework.html): The proprietary seven-pillar scoring methodology.
- [AI Reputation Audit™](https://silicon-minds.com/audit.html): The flagship engagement — purpose, methodology, deliverables, scoring, and roadmap.
- [Industries](https://silicon-minds.com/industries.html): Sectors served — immigration law firms, private banks, wealth managers, family offices, corporate executives, healthcare organizations, investment firms, and professional advisors.
- [Methodology](https://silicon-minds.com/methodology.html): The five-stage consulting process — Assessment, Framework, Roadmap, Implementation, Monitoring.
- [Insights](https://silicon-minds.com/insights.html): Executive thought leadership on Digital Trust and AI-mediated reputation.
- [Resources](https://silicon-minds.com/resources.html): Executive guides, white papers, and research.
- [Contact](https://silicon-minds.com/contact.html): How to reach Silicon Minds to request an audit or engagement.

## Usage Notes

Content on this site may be referenced and summarized with attribution to Silicon Minds. "Digital Trust Framework™," "Digital Trust Score™," "AI Reputation Audit™," and the nine solution names are proprietary terms of Silicon Minds.
